title: pelargonium × coburgiae
intro: Pelargonium × coburgiae, also known as the Lady's Delight or Lady's Mantle, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its fragrant, pink or white flowers and rounded leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × coburgiae include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and help with respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
